英國英格蘭德比夏爾莎莉
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sewallis Eatington於1128年出生時，他的父親Fulcher de Eatington33歲，母親Mrs Fulcher de Eatington30歲。他於大約1166年與Martha de Ridel在英國瓦維其可爾艾廷頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1177年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾莎莉享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sewallis Eatington于1128年出生时，他的父亲Fulcher de Eatington33岁，母亲Mrs Fulcher de Eatington30岁。他于大约1166年与Martha de Ridel在英国瓦維其可爾艾廷頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1177年在英国英格兰德比夏爾莎莉享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eatington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Edington
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Edington in Northumberland, Somerset, and Wiltshire, or from Eddington, Berkshire. Edington in Northumberland arises from Old English Idingtūn, from the Old English personal name Ida, + ing, denoting association, + tūn ‘settlement’ (compare Ida ). In Somerset, the name comes either from the Old English male name Ēadwine or from the feminine Ēadwynn + ing + tūn. Edington (Wiltshire) is from either the Old English personal name Ētha + dūn ‘hill’, or from Old English ēthe ‘uncultivated’ + dūn.

en.lifeSummary: When Sewallis Eatington was born in 1128, his father, Fulcher de Eatington, was 33 and his mother, Mrs Fulcher de Eatington, was 30. He married Martha de Ridel about 1166, in Ettington, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1177, in Shirley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sewallis Eatington est né en 1128, son père, Fulcher d’Eatington, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mrs Fulcher d’Eatington, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Martha de Ridel environ 1166, à Ettington, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1177, à Shirley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sewallis Eatington 1128 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Fulcher de Eatington 33 und seine Mutter Mrs Fulcher de Eatington 30. Er hat um 1166 in Ettington, Warwickshire, England Martha de Ridel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1177 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Shirley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sewallis Eatington è nato il nel 1128, il suo padre, Fulcher de Eatington, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Fulcher de Eatington, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Martha de Ridel circa 1166, nel Ettington, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1177, nel Shirley, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sewallis Eatingtonが1128年に生まれた時，父Fulcher de Eatingtonは33歳，母Mrs Fulcher de Eatingtonは30歳であった。約1166年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアエッティントンでMartha de Ridelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1177年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアシュイルリーで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sewallis Eatington(이)가 1128년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fulcher de Eatington(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Fulcher de Eatington(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1166년 영국 워윅실르 틴그턴에서 Martha de Ridel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1177년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 실를리에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sewallis Eatington nasceu em 1128, seu pai, Fulcher de Eatington, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Fulcher de Eatington, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Martha de Ridel aproximadamente 1166, em Ettington, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1177, em Shirley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sewallis Eatington родился в 1128 г., его отцу по имени Fulcher de Eatington было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Fulcher de Eatington, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Martha de Ridel около 1166 г. в местности эттингтон, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1177 г. в местности ширли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sewallis Eatington nació en 1128, su papá, Fulcher de Eatington, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mrs Fulcher de Eatington, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Martha de Ridel aproximadamente 1166, en Ettington, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1177, en Shirley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años.
